posts.author: lbart424 (Lisa Bart)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Moving boards is not efficient when using subfolders

What are you trying to achieve

When I have to move a board to a folder within a folder, I have to drag the board to the correct folder. In that action, it opens ALL of the subfolders and can be very time consuming and glitchy when trying to drag the board to its correct location.
